subtopic: Deep Ocean Mission and RDI Scheme
title: Samudrayaan Mission and Deep Ocean Mission (DOM)
focus: Objectives, components, and nodal ministry of the Deep Ocean Mission and the Matsya-6000 submersible.
rationale: Highly examinable for UPSC Prelims. Key facts include the depth (6000m), vehicle name (Matsya-6000), nodal ministry (MoES), and the specific components of DOM.
sectionExcerpt: Samudrayaan Mission A component of Deep Ocean Mission (DOM). Objective: Explore Ocean at 6,000-metre depth using manned submersible vehicle 'Matsya'. About Matsya-6000 4th Generation self-propelled deep-ocean human scientific submersible vehicle. Being developed by NIOT. Endurance of 12 hours under normal operation and 96 hours in case of emergency. About DOM Nodal Ministry: Ministry of Earth Sciences Purpose: Explore Deep Ocean for resources and develop deep sea technologies for sustainable use of ocean resources, thus supporting India's Blue Economy initiatives.
evidenceBullets: Samudrayaan Mission aims to explore the ocean at 6,000-metre depth using the manned submersible 'Matsya'.
Matsya-6000 is developed by NIOT with an endurance of 12 hours (normal) and 96 hours (emergency).
Deep Ocean Mission (DOM) is under the Ministry of Earth Sciences.
DOM components include deep sea mining, ocean climate change advisory, biodiversity exploration, and energy/freshwater from the ocean.

subtopic: Deep Ocean Mission and RDI Scheme
title: Research Development and Innovation (RDI) Scheme
focus: Objectives, funding mechanism, and nodal department of the RDI Scheme.
rationale: Important government scheme for boosting private sector R&D. Key facts include the 1 lakh crore fund, DST as nodal department, and the two-tiered funding mechanism involving ANRF.
sectionExcerpt: 8.8. RESEARCH DEVELOPMENT AND INNOVATION (RDI) SCHEME Why in the News? Research Development and Innovation (RDI) Scheme has been launched. Key Highlights of the Scheme Aim: Provide long-term financing or refinancing with long tenors at low/nil interest rates to spur private investments. Nodal Department: Department of Science and Technology Fund allocation: 1 lakh crore Key Objectives Encourage private sector to scale up RDI in sunrise domains and sectors relevant for economic security, strategic purpose, and self-reliance Finance transformative projects at higher Technology Readiness Levels, etc. Two-Tiered Funding Mechanism Special Purpose Fund (SPF): Established within the Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF), acting as the custodian of funds.
evidenceBullets: RDI Scheme is under the Department of Science and Technology with a 1 lakh crore fund allocation.
Aims to provide long-term financing at low/nil interest rates to spur private investments in sunrise domains.
Features a Two-Tiered Funding Mechanism with a Special Purpose Fund (SPF) established within the ANRF.
Second Level Fund Managers allocate funds as long-term concessional loans or equity funding for startups.

subtopic: Deep Ocean Mission and RDI Scheme
title: SODAR System
focus: Basic definition and location of the newly inaugurated SODAR system.
rationale: Minor news item but potential for a standalone factual question or match-the-following option in Prelims regarding its full form and location.
sectionExcerpt: 8.9. OTHER IMPORTANT NEWS 8.9.1. SODAR SYSTEM SODAR (Sound Detection and Ranging) system facility has been inaugurated at India Meteorological Department (IMD), Delhi.
evidenceBullets: SODAR stands for Sound Detection and Ranging.
The SODAR system facility was inaugurated at the India Meteorological Department (IMD) in Delhi.
